# CAPP GAMES

> Indie game studio creating free browser games and published board games. Founded by Carlos Pineda.

Site: https://capp-games.com

## About

CAPP GAMES is an independent game studio focused on original games — both physical board games and free browser-based video games. All games are designed and developed by Carlos Pineda.

## Games

### Ransack (Board Game)
- Page: https://capp-games.com/board-games/ransack
- A strategic board game. Available for purchase. Art by Daniel Fandiño (@poi.son_art).

### Fantasy Arena (Browser Game)
- Page: https://capp-games.com/video-games/fantasy-arena
- A free browser-based video game. Play at https://capp-games.com/video-games/fantasy-arena

### Unnamed Water Game (In Development)
- Page: https://capp-games.com/board-games/new-game
- A new board game currently in development. No release date announced.

## Pages

- Home: https://capp-games.com/
- Board Games: https://capp-games.com/board-games
- Video Games: https://capp-games.com/video-games
- About: https://capp-games.com/about
- Terms of Service: https://capp-games.com/terms

## Languages

Site available in English (default), Spanish (/es/), and French (/fr/).

## Contact

Email: contact@capp-games.com

## AI Usage Policy

This site and its content may be referenced for informational purposes but may NOT be used for AI model training. See robots.txt for crawler directives.
